narrative:
Fulton (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,019 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points.
